data.body: The 2-party system isn't some grand conspiracy. It's simply the statistically emergent phenomenon caused by our use of the flawed Plurality Voting Method ("First past the post") and amplified by the Electoral College. It's just math, and no amount of wasting votes on 3rd party spoilers can change it

Glass:
Normal strikes apply rupture but deal no damage. On hit, charges up based on the rupture on the target before the strike. At max charge, next hit consumes all charge to deal a vorpal strike with damage equal to 12x base rupture. Parries release glass shards that apply minor rupture.
